如果您的朋友或家人也对市場調研問卷有興趣，請放心的讓他們通過您的個人專屬推薦鏈接加入。您在登入後將會在賬戶頁面看到个人專屬推薦鏈接。通過該鏈接，他們將可以註冊一個全新的會員賬號。

replies.msg: 我都係一樣 乜撚野覺得自己改唔到 仲係好貪玩
我記得小學時，爸爸讓我倆兄弟翻看世界盃的錄影帶，他還帶我們走大斜路上香港大球場睇波踢波，就這樣，爸爸打開了我通往體育的大門。
作為球迷，一定會飛往世界各地現場睇波，順便賺埋里數。我曾飛往巴西看2014世界盃，當日數以十萬計市民在球場外為主隊打氣的震撼，實非筆墨所能形容。
終於等到2018世界盃，當然想飛去俄羅斯再一次現場感受大賽氣氛。到時記住以笑容來打招呼，以足球來作溝通，你的俄羅斯世界盃之旅定會滿載而歸！
Ole！Ole！Ole！要感受2018世界盃的熾熱氣氛，有甚麼比得上親身飛去俄羅斯！
日本來了無數次，感覺比較想去大家都沒怎麼去過的地方玩玩看呢……
又要到旅遊的熱門季節了，今天我們又給大家帶來了優惠方便的新活動！趕快來看看吧！

支那人食元素表都無事
Take the Stress Out of Deadlines
Even the word is foreboding. Deadline. Break it down: Dead. Line. It conjures up all sorts of bad imagery—as though we're queuing up for our own demise. Is it any wonder we stress over deadlines?

Let's look first at the cause of deadline stress. It's being late. No one wants a project to run behind and risk missing the deadline. It means cramming more effort into less and less remaining time. It means people get upset. It causes people to lose sleep. It's just no fun.

The key is to a follow a simple three-step formula:

1. Identify the biggest, most important tasks first
2. Assign tasks and chart the schedule
3. Monitor progress
It may take a little time to get used to, but stick with it. Develop it as part of your daily practice and you'll take a lot of stress out of your life.

replies.msg: Three Lean Principles You Can Apply Today

Transitioning into a lean operation can seem like a monumental task. You want to be more efficient, you want to improve quality and consistency of output, and to cut down on waste. The problem is, there's so much to do it's a daunting undertaking.

Start with these three things today:
1. Don't worry about fixing everything today
2. Focus on organization and efficiency
3. Develop a continuous improvement mindset
